title: Myles Garrett lists $2.1M Ohio home after Rams move—here’s what stands out
summary_full: Star defensive end Myles Garrett is selling his Ohio residence. This move follows his significant trade to the Los Angeles Rams. The Wadsworth home, purchased in 2018, is now listed for sale. It features five bedrooms and five-and-a-half bathrooms across two acres. Garrett's departure marks a new chapter on the West Coast.
